name: Zigor Valeriano-Sanz
summary: Passionate Junior Game Developer with a strong foundation in C++ and Unity engine development. Eager to contribute to creative gameplay mechanics and optimized rendering pipelines in a collaborative studio environment.

experience.title: Junior Game Developer Intern
experience.description: Assisted in the development of mobile puzzle games using Unity, focusing on UI implementation and performance optimization for low-end devices.

experience.title: QA Tester
experience.description: Performed rigorous bug tracking and regression testing for PC titles, providing detailed technical reports to the engineering team.

experience.title: Technical Support Assistant
experience.description: Provided technical troubleshooting for software applications and assisted in basic scripting tasks to automate internal reporting tools.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
